arts.ttl: Exclusive Tottenham transfer news: Spurs rekindle Marcus Rashford interest
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are interested in signing Marcus Rashford this summer if Aston Villa decide against purchasing him on a permanent deal, FootballTransfers understands. Despite this, Tottenham will rekindle their interest in Rashford if Villa decide against signing him on a permanent deal this summer.

arts.ttl: Man City v Villa team news: Rashford over Watkins, Savinho benched
arts.sum: Double Gameweek 33 continues with a huge match at the Etihad Stadium The post Man City v Villa team news: Rashford over Watkins, Savinho benched appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Aston Villa confirmed lineups: Foden, Grealish, Rashford, Watkins decisions made for crucial Premier League clash
arts.sum: Manchester City and Aston Villa confirm their starting lineups for tonight's Premier League clash at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: McAtee and Kovacic return for Premier League clash with Aston Villa
arts.sum: Former Academy player McAtee made his first Premier League start for the Blues in our 5-2 win over Crystal Palace in our last home match, scoring our fourth goal. City have won our last 14 Premier League home games against Aston Villa, scoring at least twice in each of the last 13.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news vs Man City confirmed as Emery makes Rashford and Watkins decisions
arts.sum: Aston Villa team news vs Man City confirmed as Emery makes Rashford and Watkins decisions Villa starting XI vs Man City: Martinez, Cash, Konsa, Pau, Digne, Kamara, Onana, Rogers, Tielemans, Ramsey, Rashford.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Pep Guardiola's side could enter 'full-blown bidding war' with Real Madrid, Barcelona for £68.7m midfielder
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly ready to rival Real Madrid and Barcelona for the signature of a £68.7m midfielder this summer.

arts.ttl: Manchester City v Aston Villa: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8pm BST kick-off Live scores | Read today’s Football Daily | Email Scott The race for a top-five finish is heating up … … so this is a big one. Ostensibly this is too close to call, with Manchester City coming back into form (four wins in five) and Aston Villa very much in it (ten wins in 11). However City’s current streak in this particular fixture is 14 wins in a row, so while Villa triumphed in the reverse fixture last December, Unai Emery’s side have quite the mental hurdle to clear if they’re to complete their first league double over City since 1962-63. Kick-off is at 8pm BST. It’s on! Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'We will be paid well': Director admits his 'elite' £20m player could now leave after Aston Villa talks
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Arsenal are likely to be busy in the summer transfer window as they look to increase their strength in depth this season....

arts.ttl: Man City vs Aston Villa - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Ollie Watkinsis dropped AGAIN by Unai Emery for crucial clash in Champions League race
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Manchester City welcome Aston Villa to the Etihad for midweek Premier League clash.

arts.ttl: Man Utd rival Man City for Pep Guardiola's top target
arts.sum: FootballTransfers exclusively revealed in January that Costa has emerged as one of the priority targets for Man City, who are expected to part ways with Ederson this summer. However, Man City are far from the only club interested in adding an elite goalkeeper this summer, and Man Utd have also taken a keen interest in Costa, according to Correio da Manha .
